title: lolium perenne subsp. boucheanum
intro: Lolium perenne subsp. boucheanum, also known as Bouche's perennial ryegrass, is a subspecies of perennial ryegrass native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lolium perenne subsp. boucheanum include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its possible use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Lolium perenne subsp. boucheanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to leverage its medicinal properties.
